options.description: What to create in a new workspace (options: "empty", "npm", "web-components", "angular", "angular-nest", "react", "react-express", "react-native", "next", "gatsby", "nest", "express")
The name of the application created by some presets
CLI to power the Nx workspace (options: "nx", "angular")

Default style option to be used when a non-empty preset is selected options: ("css", "scss", "less") plus ("styl") for all non-Angular and ("styled-components", "@emotion/styled", "styled-jsx") for Re
Enable interactive mode when using presets (boolean)
Package manager to use (npm, yarn, pnpm)
